title: Achievement of Sustained Net Plasma Heating in a Fusion Experiment with the Optometrist Algorithm
authors: E. A. Baltz, E. Trask, M. Binderbauer, M. Dikovsky, H. Gota, R. Mendoza, J. C. Platt, and P. F. Riley
source_description: Supplementary Table S1: all C-2U shots with positive heating power at t > 1 ms, remaining positive for > 0.1 ms, while E_thermal > 1 kJ.

columns.Eth(kJ): post-formation averaged thermal energy in kilojoules
columns.Fp(mWb): post-formation averaged poloidal flux in milliwebers
columns.T(keV): post-formation averaged total temperature in kiloelectronvolts
columns.t_max(ms): time of maximum net heating power in milliseconds
columns.P_max(MW): maximum net heating power in megawatts
columns.E_max(kJ): thermal energy at time of maximum net heating power in kilojoules

claim_boundary: Public C-2U positive-net-heating performance table; not Slough 2011 Fig. 5 trajectory parity and not a time-resolved pulsed-compression benchmark.
